name: Chiffon Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the margarine and egg yolks. Blend well.
2. Sift together the flour, baking powder, sugar, and salt.
3. Add to the margarine mixture alternately with milk, blending well.
4. Beat the egg whites until stiff.
5. Fold in the beaten egg whites.
6. Bake in a hot, greased waffle iron until steaming stops.
